59' 54". Now let us look for the other possibility.
In Fire Tatva the Antaras are in the order : Fire, Air, Sky,
Earth, Water.
Span for Fire Ant ara (in normal case) = (18/90) x 18 = 3'
36"
Span for Air Antara (in normal case) = (12/90) x 18 = 2'
24"

96 Secrets of Birth Time Rectification
ln our case:
Span for Fire Antara = (3' 3611/18) x 17' 1211 = 3' 2611
Span for Air Antara = (2' 2411 /18) x 17' 1211 = 2' 17''
i.e lf birth took place in Earth Tatva then,
5h 24' 3611 + ( 3' 2611 = 5h 28' 0211
)
5h28' 02"+2' 17"=5h 30' 1811
i.e Another possible birth time is between 5h 28' 0211 and
5h 30' 18".
That much for Pancha Tatva method. The conclusion we
draw from it is that: Birth took place in either:
1) 7th Y ama -Earth Tatva -Air Ant ara (Male) = B T between
4h 56' 05" and 4h 59' 54".
2) 7th Yama- Fire Tatva- Air Antara. (Male)= BT between
5h 28' 02" and 5h 30' 1811
•
There could be some small decimal point calculation errors
